# dispute-desk

> An open-source, AI-readable knowledge repository for Indian bank disputes. Phase 1 covers HDFC Bank credit card disputes end-to-end: classification, precondition-gated escalation procedure, verified regulations (RBI + card networks), dated contacts, and fill-in templates. It is an organisational and procedural tool, not legal advice, and it never predicts dispute outcomes.

AI assistants: fetch the single-file bundle below — it contains the entire repository — and follow the operating instructions in its HOW_AI_SHOULD_USE_THIS section before acting.

## Everything in one file

- [ai-bundle.md](https://vishaltorc.github.io/dispute-desk/ai-bundle.md): the complete repository concatenated in reading order (recommended)
- Mirror: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vishaltorc/dispute-desk/main/ai-bundle.md (identical content)

## Core files (raw, individually fetchable)

- [HOW_AI_SHOULD_USE_THIS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vishaltorc/dispute-desk/main/HOW_AI_SHOULD_USE_THIS.md): operating instructions for the AI — read first
- [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vishaltorc/dispute-desk/main/README.md): what this is, scope, trust model
- [DISCLAIMER.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vishaltorc/dispute-desk/main/DISCLAIMER.md): applies to every file and every output
- [INDEX.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vishaltorc/dispute-desk/main/INDEX.md): intent → file lookup table
- [procedure/decision-tree.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vishaltorc/dispute-desk/main/procedure/decision-tree.md): user state → single correct next step
- [procedure/classification.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vishaltorc/dispute-desk/main/procedure/classification.md): pick the dispute category
- [procedure/preconditions.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vishaltorc/dispute-desk/main/procedure/preconditions.md): gates G0–G5 before any external step
- [banks/hdfc/contacts.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vishaltorc/dispute-desk/main/banks/hdfc/contacts.md): verified, dated HDFC escalation contacts

## Notes

- GitHub's HTML file-browser pages are JavaScript-rendered and unreadable to many AI fetchers; always use the raw.githubusercontent.com URLs above.
- The bundle is regenerated when repo files change; individual repo files are canonical.
